entry.title: Unable to Create Notification for Customer Services
entry.content:
We are migrating from ECC to SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition 2402 with Rise Package, In a Package we have also added Customer Service Module, it was also a part of DDA Scope item. Our implementation activities are stopped because of unavailability of total customer Service functionalities like,

1. Creation of Notification for customer Complaint

2. Warranty Management

3.Pricing strategy in service Order

My Question is if SAP is not yet released these functionalities, Why the offerings have been made? It's really disguising situation and being a remote MSME user its really upsetting us and loosing trust on SAP as above listed functionalities are basic need of customer service, Need immediate solution

entry.title: How WBS element alphanumeric number is picked while creating WBSelement in CJ11
entry.content:
Hi Experts

while creating WBS element in CJ11 transaction, how does system pick the alphanumeric numbers, where do we perform the configuration for picking up different WBS element one after the other

EX if we create WBS element as - DC-1031636802-SM

next one will be DC-1031636803-SM

 

where does we perform the configuration for the above

 

Regards

Jithendra Sivashankar

entry.title: Customer return - Data fro creating a delivery is incomplete (Customer) - M7278
entry.content:
Hello,

In case of customer return (Scope item - BKP), I would like to perform after an inspection result with the following activity 0015 'Transfer to Specified Stock' from a MM storage location to a EWM storage location (for IBD creation HID 'Inb.Deliv.Gds Mvmnt'). 

I get the following error message 'M7278 - Data for create a delivery is incomplete'.

My partner for the plant seems to be well created (and the link to customer and supplier is done), the shipping point determination too.

I don't find the root cause, do you have any ideas ? 

In advance, thanks.

Regards,

Nicolas

entry.title: Re: BAPI TO CREATE CUSTOMER MATERIAL INFO RECORD CLASSIFICATION (VD51)
entry.content:
RV_CUSTOMER_MATERIAL_UPDATE is an update task FM, so basically only contains some abap sql statement and no functional checks.

(Kind of FM not released and not intended for customer development, perform where-used search to find a correct wrapper)

entry.title: USING FORMULA & ROUTINES CAN I ASSIGN CUSTOM NUMBER RANGE TO SALES DOC TYPE FOR PARTICULAR SALESAREA
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I have a situation where client have single sales organization & multiple sales area, the client is requesting for external number range for particular sales area, & internal number range for all other sales area, In sap s/4 hana public cloud edition 2402 is it possibile to assign custom number range based on sales area to single sales doucment type (OR), can we use formula & routines for setting number range to same document type 

if the solution is available then please suggest how to achieve the same

Thanks

Rahul Singhal

Hi,

Currently this is not possible, but this is a planned development just round the corner! So I hope you will able to see it out-of-the-box from fe (v4) in one of the upcoming releases!

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Workflow User Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

ABAP Development SAP Workflow Management 

In a PO Release Workflow have fork with 5 branches , First branch mail will be send to user outlook once PO created/ changed he apporove/reject there , if he approve PO gets released then workflow end.

Next Branch , User will go to ME28 and release the PO then PO gets released ,Mail will be send workflow ends.

Issue is for one user when he use ME28 to Release ,PO is Released/Released event occured  but Mail step not Triggered .

 

I have tried using SWUE event is tiggered ,Mail step is completed.This issue is happening only when using ME28 for xxxx User , No issue with other users

Difference I noticed ,When Release through SWUE

 

When Release happening through ME28, I see here internal RFC call.

 

Please Guide here.

entry.title: Re: Create Button Group on Object Page Header in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are talking about application defined actions (like the manifest based ones or the annotation based ones), grouping is indeed possible. Please see V4 specific section "Grouping Actions as Menu Buttons" in page for more information.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:
Hi @JulianJuraske,

The validations framework  has been released with a goal of preventing the run time errors and to assist the modeller for an efficient modeling. As informed in the blog, there will be more validations coming up and based on the depth of validation further decisions on including them as part of task chain can be considered. 

Br,

Mona

entry.title: Re: Create Button Group on Object Page Header in Fiori El...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are talking about app-defined actions (manifest based ones or annotation based ones), grouping is indeed possible. Please see V4 specific section "Grouping Actions as Menu Buttons" in page for more information.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content: Feature NG-6369: Enhancement for Japanese Invoices to Display Tax Rate of Line Items has been delayed and will be available for all Customers/Partners in upcoming Q3 2408 Release.

entry.title: Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Unauth
entry.content:
He have configured the TMS for transport iflowb between our accounts but when we want to do a transport it fails in the last step, importing transport request with the next error:

Exception during start of deployment for deploy type 'SLP_CTS': Error during client creation: Unauthorized

The target destination is configured as - https://deploy-service.cfapps.<domain>/slprot/<myorg>/<myspace>/slp

wiht basic authentication. The user has the space developer role. We're stucked with this question.

Any alternative? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content: Better late than never... 😄

entry.title: Re: provider contract inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Subbareddy2,

The error message doesn't come from Convergent Charging.
Still, if you need to analyse what happened within Convergent Charging, you can enable the "WS" debug traces in the updater and then reproduce the scenario.
This can be done using either the Cockpit web UI, or admin+.sh with the two following commands:
set LS_TRC_DOMAIN WS memory updater
set LS_TRC_SEVERITY DEBUG memory updater

Then, you'll see the SOAP dumps in the updater's TRC files, and it'll tell you whether CC faces issues or not.
Can you please try that and let us know the outcome?

Thanks, and best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to configure Session Handling in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hi Mandy,
Thank You for the nice blog. Would is the key of a session/backend? To take care that the session is reused, need all channels which should use the same session point to the same receiver? Or would the session be reused even if I use several receiver for the same backend? I do not like picture like this:

Thanks
Bernd

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud - Data Migration in Action
entry.content:
@mateuszporzucek very nice extensive blog .

Some comments/additional hints:
- the DB prefix is in my opinion optional; helpful only when you want to switch between the 2 "versions".
- Always: Do a Snapshot after the initialization of the DB. Otherwise you might have a non-functional system after a not-successful DB migration and need to ask SAP for a DB wipe which can take a couple of days .... 
- the cloud db is encrypted by default, which means if you have your onPrem DB not encrypted, you will have a login problem. An option is to ask SAP per ticket to remove the encryption (per environment) and only then do the db migration. 

- Use the snapshot function to populate other environments.

Related to that: There is a recommendation by SAP to change the db encryption regularly, but the SAP documentation could be more detailed ... (especially related to the masterpassword change).  If you want to do another blog, maybe you want to consider this topic ....

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax in Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content: Thank you for adding the tag. "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" tag has been removed.

entry.title: Formatted Search for Bin Location Allocation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Hope you are well!

I am currently trying to develop a new FMS UDF to integrate into our Goods Receipt PO table in the aim to display the allocated BIn location for each line. however my logic need some work:

SELECT  T1.[BinCode] FROM PDN1 T0  INNER JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0.DftBinAbs = T1.AbsEntry WHERE T0.[ItemCode] = $[861.3.0]

Is this somthing that is possible to achieve?

entry.title: Editar casilla Factura ventas Importe del Impuesto
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

en ocasiones tenemos discrepancia en las facturas clientes en el impuesto.

En proveedores, la casilla "importe del impuesto" se la deja modificar cuando alguna discrepancia en el importe del IVA por redondeos.

En clientes, este campo no podemos editarlo. ¿Hay alguna forma de mantener el campo editable en ventas también igual que está en compras?

entry.title: Is the ChatGPT extension free for FSM, or do we have to pay for it?
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to add the ChatGPT extension to our FSM system. I would like to know if it is free or if we have to pay for it. Additionally, is there any demo trial available for a specific period?

Regards,

Sakil Ahmed

entry.title: Re: I have added custom object under multiprovider but it...
entry.content:
I'm not sure what the expectation is here. If you mapped the fields of the additional providers in the MPRO and if you put those fields into either a column, row or free characteristic in the query designer, then the content of those partproviders are requested during query runtime.

 

If you want to filter on data of a specific partprovider, use 0INFOPROV to restrict.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:
Hi @MKreitlein ,

At the moment, the main objective of the validation framework is to assist and prevent the modeling run time error and that's why currently the views are considered for validations. But as you mentioned in terms of key and null validations, we can push it to table as well. More information on this will be updated on road map explorer - Additional model validations to be delivered very soon.

Br,

Mona

entry.title: Re: Combination of FioriElements & UI5 Freestyle in CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can control the navigation target via means described in page (see section "Enable External Navigation")

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content: For more complex conditions, you need to pass them via SelectionVariant - see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.fe.navigation.NavigationHandler%23methods/navigate

entry.title: Join 3 tables
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Can you help me join these 3 tables?

  SELECT ebeln
         bsart
    FROM ekko
    INTO TABLE it_ekko
   WHERE bsart = 'ZLSR'.

  IF it_ekko IS NOT INITIAL.
    SELECT ebeln,
           ebelp,
           matnr,
           werks,
           menge,
           bwtty,
           bwtar
      FROM ekpo
       FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_ekko
     WHERE ebeln = @IT_ekko-ebeln
      INTO TABLE @IT_ekpo.

    IF it_ekpo IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT stprs,
             matnr,
             bwkey,
             bwtar,
             bwtty
        FROM mbew
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_ekpo
       WHERE matnr = @IT_ekpo-matnr
         AND bwkey = @IT_ekpo-werks
        INTO TABLE @IT_mbew.

        IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

I've already tried this and it's not getting the right record. 

SELECT c~stprs,
       c~matnr,
       c~bwkey,
       c~bwtar,
       c~bwtty
  FROM ekko AS A
    INNER JOIN ekpo AS b
          ON a~ebeln = b~ebeln
    INNER JOIN mbew AS c
          ON c~matnr = b~matnr
         AND c~bwkey = b~werks
  WHERE a~bsart = 'ZLSR'
  INTO TABLE @DATA(it_temp).

 With using the first code sample IT_MBEW gets 41 records while using the 2nd code sample, IT_TEMP gets 112 records.

entry.title: Unable to link p-user with s-user because they both have separate universal ids
entry.content: I am unable to link my personal account (p-user) to my work SAP account (s-user), the problem is I created a universal id for both accounts. I have certification on the p-user account and a learning hub on the s-user one. How can I now link them when they already have separate UIDs? I get an error message when trying telling me that the account is already linked to a UID. I need this as I want to be able to renew my certification through the learning hub.

entry.title: Re: sub total of each page in smart forms
entry.content:
Hi,

In case you do not wonna to have selected the option Page Break in footer of main table, you can do this:

  1. Create a global variable to store the subtotal.
  2. At table's calculations select:
    Operation->Total,
    Field Name->The field you want to loop,
    Target->The global variable you created,
    Initialization->checked.
  3. In the main area of the table, add program lines with the code to calculate the sum
    Target = Target + Field Name.
  4. Add code in the footer area to clear the variable
    CLEAR Target.
  5. Use the variable in a window.

Thanks.

entry.title: how to get Organization Secret and User Secret to configuration API provider?
entry.content:
I am trying to configure API provider but I do not know how to get 

  • Organization Secret
  • User Secret

I researched but that solution was old version.

entry.title: Re: Join 3 tables
entry.content:
What did you expect? (Hint: I think it is your expectation that is wrong, not the result.)

You're joining EKPO and MBEW on material number and plant/valuation area, so while the stand-alone selection from MBEW finds 41 unique combinations of MATNR and BWKEY the joined selection finds that these 41 combinations are used in 112 purchase order items.

But there is possibly something else that isn't right here. You have a join that assumes that the valuation area for a plant has an ID that is exactly the same as the ID of the plant itself. Perhaps that is true, but perhaps it isn't. You should in principle join via the plant master data table T001W to ensure you get the correct number of records and the correct values.

entry.title: Re: Output management for changed documents in SAP S/4 HANA.
entry.content:
Hi Saideep,

We are facing an issue related to this configuration. We have found in production that for a specific sales area when we modify a quantity of an item, it adds an "in preparation" line even though there are existing "To be output" lines (may be it doesn't have to be the sales area, but we only have found the issue in other orders for that area). For other areas it behaves like you have described, adding the line only if the previous lines are all completed. 

We haven't been able to replicate this in a lower environment, and at some point, we found an existing order that gave the same issue for the same plant (in the lower environment), but when creating other orders as a copy of this one, the issue didn't happened.

Do you have any clue on where to search?

 

Thank you, 

 

Álvaro

entry.title: Re: SAC Table - 3 Dimension Rows are merged to 1 Row auto...
entry.content: I'm wondering it might be related to 'universal hierarchy' enabled on BW query row axis dimensions.

entry.title: Query About Process Chains in SAP PAPM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question regarding process chains in SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PAPM). During implementation, we typically create one process chain. Upon completion of the implementation, we deployed the above process chain that time another process chain is automatically created . Both process chains are visible during function runs after implementation.

My question is: which process chain is the correct one to choose during function execution, and why? after implementation

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC SAP TM : Extending TM Location with Additional Attributes
entry.content:
Thank you for this information Rohit. 

Very useful

entry.title: Re: deleting actual cost estimate for a material
entry.content:
the solution was to contact SAP (actually, this was advised by SAP note, which number I cannot find now). They did some magic, and I subsequently closed all the periods I need.
Also they suggested to implement note 3387722.
Case closed.

entry.title: How to import camt.053 with structured remittance details for a batched incoming payment
entry.content:
Have a camt.053 containing an incoming payment (one NtryRef) that is batched and the belonging individual reference details are provided as structured references in TxDtls > RmtInf -> Strd segment.

When importing the camt.053 it throws an error about FEBRE overrun (there are approx. 5000 individual payments). FEBRE can hold 999 lines per KUKEY and it might be a bit confusing to have all 5000 invoice references in the Memo Line field.

Believe the XLST transformation need to be adjusted but where is the best place to store the structured references to obtain an automatic clearing?

The system is S/4HANA OP.

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content: Thanks for the update @akashbansode-34

entry.title: Re: Syntax error in ABAP SELECT statement - OFFSET is invalid ( due to grammar)
entry.content: In the version 7.51 release documentation : New Addition OFFSET in SELECT

entry.title: Re: S4: Customizing not active after import - table buffer issue
entry.content: Sounds like the buffer synchronization is not working properly... that is a must because configuration tables almost exclusively rely on the buffering mechanism.

entry.title: LeanIX Enterprise Architecture - free Academic Edition
entry.content:
The SAP LeanIX Academic Edition is tailored to universities and teaching institutions, providing free access to our ready-to-use Enterprise Architecture Management tool. SAP LeanIX backs the architects of tomorrow as they learn to leverage technology, make decisions, and manage changes in more outcome-driven approaches.

How much it costs?

Nothing! The academic edition is available free of charge for teaching purposes

What is included in the academic edition?

The SAP LeanIX Academic Edition offers access to our Enterprise Architecture Management product with the Application Portfolio Management, the Technology & Risk Management and the Business Transformation Management module. Note that the Academic Edition can only be requested by lecturers who can then provide access to individual students.

For more details and next steps visit our webpage under SAP LeanIX - Academic Edition

Are you interested in teaching with SAP LeanIX? 

Best regards,

SAP University Alliances

entry.title: Re: Join 3 tables
entry.content: Hello guys. I will be closing this thread. i already got the solution. I just deleted the duplicates. Thank you.

entry.title: CAP CDS entity is not creating HANA DB table under specified schema in DB model / mta.yaml
entry.content:
Hi CAP experts,

In CDS definition the @Schema is specified as 'DBADMIN' (DBADMIN is used here as example, we can specify any other schema). Using mbt build the mta.tar file has been created.

when deployed using CF deploy it is creating random schema for creating tables in HANA database.

1. CDS definition, here @Schema is specified:

However when 'tar' file for this deployed to BTP Cloud foundry for database 'hana', it goes to some random generated schema:

2. Using the config parameter in mta.yaml is also not creating the tables in required schema:

 

How can we specify HANA DB schema explicitly for the tables created by CAP model.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello.

I have been hearing about SAP from my friends telling me that there is a good career path in this line of work, and I have been curious about it for some time as I have been pondering for a long time to change career. Fortunately, I saw a post on Reddit specifically about this initiative leading me here. I am very interested to learn SAP and willing to put in hours in order to understand its fundamentals and processes as I think with the vast application of SAP there is a lot to learn and room for growth.

Thank you.

entry.title: Get all orders for a specific SoldToParty via API (A2X)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I would like to create an Order History feature in our Commerce Cloud by listing all orders of a specific customer. To achieve this, I need to retrieve all orders of the customer (SoldToParty) at both header and item level (although item level information can be obtained later using the order number from the header).

My aim is to retrieve all orders from ERP (S4/Hana) via an API request regardless of the SalesOrderType.

Can you please advise which A2X API can be used for this purpose and provide guidance on the Request for such a GET call?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Join 3 tables
entry.content:
You can add T001W so that your code will also other options of Customizing (as suggested by @KjetilKilhavn.

But also check for MM Customizing : Split Valuation, you can get multiple valuation per plant (e.g. new/used and a total record) and you don't provide enough fields in the join.

  • I ususally add a "bwtty = space OR bwtar <> space" clause to remove duplicates in some MM reports.
  • Note that BWTAR and BWTTY are also in table EKPO but you don't use them
  • Use STPRS when VPRSV is 'S' and VERPR when 'V' 

What exactly are you looking for in MBEW?

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Build – Q2 2024 Edition
entry.content: @mohit_bansal3 we do have a capability for exception handling that allows you to trigger an action from a process visibility scenario. You can trigger a process or a navigational action automatically based on certain events in the process, including an exception. We will share more details in the community soon, you can also check the available documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-actions?locale=en-US&version=Cloud

entry.title: Print Form Adaptation in Sales/Service 2: Get XML data for preview in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
Introduction

Previewing print forms "locally" within the Adobe LiveCycle Designer is an essential feature. Otherwise, you spend too much time uploading the print form to the system to preview it online after every small change. However, not only changing the template and testing it straight away is a significant advantage. Simply adapting the XML sample data to see, for instance, how a field looks when containing a different value, longer text, etc., is beneficial in contrast to creating a new sample document within the system for this purpose.

 

Disclaimer

The procedure to extract XML data for local preview described in this blog is not an official feature! Hence, there is no guarantee that it will always work like this. If you face any problems with it, you can't ask SAP support for help. However, you can ask questions here, and I'll be happy to answer them.

 

Supported Objects

With the procedure described in this blog, you can extract data for most of the objects that SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2 offers PDF generation for. The following table gives an overview of the objects and shows where the procedure is applicable. For Leads and Surveys the procedure is unfortunately not applicable as those use a different technique to generate the PDF. However, there are alternatives that can help you even with those objects. I've included more details on this below.


ObjectProcedure applicable
AppointmentYes
CaseYes
LeadNo
Registered ProductYes
Sales QuoteYes
SurveyNo

 

Tools - Prerequisites

To carry out all necessary steps, we need a special toolset with capabilities to decode Base64 text and convert JSON to XML. If you don't do such things every day and have the right tool for that already installed, this might be a first challenge. When searching the internet for suitable solutions, you might quickly find some free online services that offer their help and, thankfully take the data you provide...

I highly encourage you to never use any kind of free or publicly available online services for such kinds of tasks due to data protection and privacy reasons! I'm sure several tools out there can do the job. In this guide, I use Visual Studio Code in combination with two plugins:

  • For decoding Base64, we can use the Mime Tools plugin: ajogyashree.mimeconvertor
  • For converting JSON to XML, we can use the convert json, yaml, xml, and others plugin: petli-full.json-to-yaml-and-more

Visual Studio Code is free and available for all common platforms. The mentioned plugins are published under the MIT license, and their source code can be found on Git Hub. A much better alternative to online services 💪

 

Procedure

Log in to SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2 with your browser and navigate to the screen where you can open the preview or generate the summary of the desired document. I use the Sales Quote as an example here.

Open your browser's Developer Tools and activate the Network tab. In most browsers they look very similar and offer the same feature set. Depending on your browser, some elements might have a different caption. The screenshots of this blog were created using the Windows version of Google Chrome. In many browsers you can also access the developer tools by pressing [F12] or the key combination [Ctrl]+[Shift]+[ i ].

 

In Chrome, there are two buttons on the very left (A) that allow you to start and stop recording network activities and clear the log in case you have recorded too much and want to start over again. Make sure the recording is active while carrying out the next step.

In SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2, you can now hit the button to open the preview (or in other objects: generate the summary). On the Sales Quote screen, we can find the Preview (1) button in the three dots menu (or one screen earlier on the work list):

After opening the preview, you'll see an entry in the network monitor that points to /sap/c4c/api/v1/output-management-service/template/renderForm (2). This call triggers the PDF generation and luckily, it reveals the data that's handed over to the Adobe Document Services/Forms Service by Adobe that are used in the background. Select the entry and activate the Payload tab (3). The request payload consists of JSON data. The field businessJsonData (4) contains the actual document data in JSON format, encoded as Base64. We can already see the light at the end of the tunnel! But we still have some work to do: We still have to decode the Base64 string and convert the resulting JSON to XML.

This is where Visual Studio Code and the mentioned plugins come into play or your favorite tool that can do these tasks.

Copy the Base64 to an empty Visual Studio Code text file. Pay attention that you copy the whole Base64 string as the browser may only show the beginning of the lengthy text. Possibly there, is a separate [Copy] button next to it, as seen in the screenshot above (4). In case the copied text starts or ends with quotes ( " ), remove them.

Then, it's time to use the first plugin: Mime Tools. Make sure the whole Base64 text is selected ( [Ctrl]+[A] ), and open the command palette (with default settings [F1] or [Ctrl]+[Shift]+[P] ), and search for "Mime Tools: Base 64 Decode".

Format the JSON by choosing Format Document from the context menu and scroll down to the end of the file. Make sure the JSON structure is valid, i.e., all brackets are closed correctly and that there is no additional content behind the last closing bracket. This can happen if you didn't copy the whole Base64 string or had other characters selected when decoding.

Then, we use the second plugin to convert the JSON content to XML. Open the command palette once more and search for JSON, YAML, XML and more. After selecting it, you have to enter the source and the target format in a second prompt. Enter "json | xml" (without the quotes) and wait a moment. The plugin will automatically create the XML representation of the JSON file in a new document tab.

The final step is to replace the root element <root> and the XML declaration with the one for Adobe form templates:

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xfa:data xmlns:xfa="http://www.xfa.org/schema/xfa-data/1.0/">
	<data>
		...
	</data>
</xfa:data>

 

 

The following screenshot shows the XML before (left) and after (right):

After replacing the root element, you have the final sample data XML that you can load into the Adobe LiveCycle Designer for local preview.

That's it!

At first, this procedure might seem a bit complex and cumbersome. But it's worth the effort! The good news is: You can do it whenever you need it without opening a support ticket and waiting for an answer, or uploading a special template, which might not be possible in a productive environment, etc.

 

Alternatives

As mentioned earlier, the procedure explained here doesn't work for all objects. Luckily, there are workarounds for the remaining objects.

 

REST API

SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2 heavily relies on REST APIs, which are also used to load object data on the web frontend. You can see this in the Developer Tools' Network monitor. As far as I figured out, the structure (not the whole content!) returned by the REST API services, is compatible with the form template sample data. Example: A lead contains the node "account" which in turn contains the node "address" with the corresponding fields respectively.

That means, when opening a lead in SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2, the Network monitor will show a call to the service /sap/c4c/api/v1/lead-service/leads/<UUID> that returns the lead data as JSON.

This JSON can be converted to XML, and after replacing the root element, it can technically be used as XML sample data.

Keep in mind that this is not exactly the same JSON/XML
that the system would use to generate the PDF.

When comparing the data from the REST API response with the data that was actually used for generating the lead summary, I found out that there are differences. In my test, the REST API was missing the field accountContactsStatusDescription, for instance. With other sample data, other fields could be missing or containing slightly different values. If the data contained currency fields, they occur with a different number formatting in the REST API response, while the actual output data takes care of things like formatting of decimal places.

You can use the REST API approach for other objects as well. Depending on the object, the differences might have a smaller or bigger impact on the result.

Conclusion: While the data of the REST API might serve as valid XML sample data from the structural point of view, it might still differ. Hence, you cannot rely on this approach for the entire design and testing process, at least not without knowing the differences and where to pay attention to. However, knowing these differences can still help you quickly get sample data even if it is out of productive systems.

If you would like to know how the actual structure looks, you should read the section about the Debug Sheet below.

 

REST API - Special Case: Sales Quote

The Sales Quote service offers an interesting parameter to get closer to the actual output data, at least from the perspective of the fields contained. If you look closely at the screenshot of the Sales Quote Preview call, you will notice another request before the renderForm one:

4bd6c4c2-cfa4-44ef-8290-ae7b7b483d8c?$forOutput=true

Comparing the call responses with and without this parameter showed at least differences in the priceElements structure in my tests. But even the "forOutput call" didn't have the correct number formattings for currencies. Therefore, my conclusion for this alternative is as follows:

Conclusion: I suggest still using the initially described procedure using data from the renderForm call to avoid formatting issues. Furthermore, this alternative seems to be available for sales quotes only. Hence it doesn't apply to other objects anyways. (Calling other services with this parameter didn't change their response in my tests.)

 

Debug Sheet - Get the XML data with a special form template

If nothing else works, you can still upload a special template that displays the actual XML data handed over from the system as text in the PDF. For that, you can use my "Debug Sheet", which I created some time ago. It's a minimalistic template that focuses on extracting the data XML and making "copy and paste" from the PDF as easy as possible (the small font size shall help to decrease the number of page and line breaks).

You can download the "Debug Sheet 2" here.

In contrast to version 1, which used a special script to read and display the XML, version 2 uses the built-in function xfa.data.saveXML("pretty"); .

To use it when generating a PDF, you have to upload it as a custom template and assign it in the Form Template Selection.

While the Debug Sheet gives you the best insights into the XML data with the finally available fields and number formattings, copying the XML out of the PDF is error-prone. And before you can use it, you have to upload the form template first, which is usually okay in a test environment, but often problematic if you need to get data from a productive system, for instance, when the currently uploaded form template has some issues.

Conclusion: Use the Debug Sheet in test environments where the renderForm procedure can't be used. This ensures the best result in this situation. As long as you are aware of the differences to the REST API, you can consider switching between these methods depending on the use case.

 

Final Conclusion

For SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2, you should use the renderForm procedure whenever possible to extract data for local preview from the system. If this approach is not applicable (Leads and Surveys), you should use the DebugSheet to get sample data. If this alternative is not possible, for instance, because someone discovered an issue with the currently uploaded Lead form template in a productive system and you need to extract data right from there. However, keep in mind that the root cause could exactly be the difference between REST API and actual output data. So, you should know the differences when using the REST API(s).

 

Live Sessions

I deliver monthly live sessions with a changing agenda on print form adaptation. If you are interested and would like to join, you can find the details as follows:

Starting in 2024, the live sessions have moved to a new platform: You can find them via this new direct link on learning.sap.com. (You still need a corresponding subscription in order to register for the live session.)

entry.title: Access to Performance Analysis tool in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to provide a user access to the performance analysis tool in SAC without giving the user Admin/BI Admin privileges?. Please suggest.

I have access to the tool but I am not Admin and want to grant another user access to the Perf Analysis tool.

 

 

Cheers,

entry.title: Re: deleting actual cost estimate for a material
entry.content:
Wow, nice... The magic they did is using CKMHELP as per 364368 - Material ledger help desk

"Note that you can execute all ML help desk programs to analyze the
data in the test run. Any corrections in
the update run are to be implemented by SAP Support only."

 

BR,

 

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Purchasing Quotation Output Error Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have an issue regarding the purchasing quotation output.

In our system no message was created for a quotation. In the "Output details" tab, there is no determination analysis analogous to the old message determination. The problem cannot be reproduced - not even by copying the quotation.
The history in the output parameter determination provides no indication of the problem.
How can such a problem be analyzed?

 

Thanks a lot for every comment.

 

Kind regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: CL_ABAP_TYPEDESCR not released in BTP ABAP Environmen...
entry.content: That was correct.

entry.title: Re: Unused account in public cloud
entry.content:
There was no number displayed, only the message above.
The issue was resolved after a period of time, and it seems that it was simply a matter of synchronising the system.

entry.title: Re: Document 1010 5215268124 is not a purely a clearing d...
entry.content:
Dear Sridhar, 

The error message is self-explanatory. You are trying FBRA on document 1010 5215268124, but some line item of this document is been cleared by another document, in your case 2611243472. So first you need to Reset 2611243472, then you can do it with 1010 5215268124.

 

BR,

 

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
@ULF1 I had the same issue. The service key does not contain the namespace used during definition of the queue. If you take the service key into the S/4 channel creation, make sure to add the namespace.

Example

...
    "serviceinstanceid": "xxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx",
    "namespace": "L1/L2/l3",
    "uaa": {
...
That it will work if the queue subscriptions are correctly maintained as well.

entry.title: Re: DMC - Shop Floor Paper
entry.content:
Hi @ManoelCosta,

Thanks for the good explanation however I didn't saw how we can manage this for multiple languages. Is this also possible in SAP DM?

entry.title: Re: Unable to link p-user with s-user because they both have separate universal ids
entry.content:
Please look into this URL: https://www.sap.com/account/universal-id.html

The procedures regarding the Universal ID management are described on the SAP KBA 2948234 - Frequently Asked Questions - SAP Universal ID (UID).

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hi @jonas_geiser,

Is this issue resolved? Can you please try to add "RegistryDeveloper" role to your user?

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Hi @Cocquerel,

Currently, you will have to access the older BAS projects via Dev Space Manager.

The SAP Build Lobby is common for a subaccount. So if your SAP Build Code instance is on the same subaccount as the other SAP Build solutions, you will have a common SAP Build Lobby

entry.title: Re: How to use digital signatures for document legalizati...
entry.content: To ensure SAP's digital signatures are legally binding internationally, you'll need to follow local laws and regulations for each country involved. Setting up involves configuring the necessary modules like SAP Digital Signatures. Make sure you have proper authentication processes in place too.

entry.title: Re: SLT - Transformation - How to add new fields to existing source table and populate them to Targe
entry.content:
Hi Rogger,

Can you please provide your suggestion.

we are facing the similar issue AbeDong

First we create one record in source system, in target system, the insert timestamp is populated.
Then we change the same record in source system, in target system, the update timestamp is populated. But at the same time, the insert timestamp is wiped out. Our requirement is keep the insert timestamp, would you please give some suggestion on this.

entry.title: Re: How do I configure automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content: a

entry.title: Re: How do I configure automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content: Using SAP FCLOCO can significantly streamline and automate your closing activities, making the process more efficient. Check out this video https://youtu.be/IkFGukkvycE?si=PfSrfN6zGRqEPZvz for a detailed guide on how to implement and maximize the benefits of SAP FCLOCO.

entry.title: Re: Up to 5 Decimal Places for quantities in general journal
entry.content:
I suggest you work with bigger ratios so you don't have problems with the unit of measure decimals.

For example, considering an imaginary UoM, if you have  1Z1 = 1.1234567 and you have a restrictions with the decimals, it will be better to manage a bigger ratio  1000 Z1 = 1123.4567.

Just an idea

 

Check - https://me.sap.com/notes/3463784/E

entry.title: Redis on SAP BTP - Create a service instance in CF via BTP Cockpit
entry.content:
Learn how to create a Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance via SAP BTP Cockpit in your Global Account and on you preferred hyperscaler and supported regions.

Setp-by-setp process:

Please create or use an already existing Sub-Account (SA) and check if you have the necessary entitlements.

ℹ️Redis service has a minimum number of cache nodes, depending on the hyperscaler (check here), you need to have available a minimum of units of entitlements of memory (Standard service plan = 2GB memory blocks or Premium service plan = 4 GB memory blocks). Please check this blog post to understand service entitlements and metrics.

 

If you want to learn more about the service check also the 'How to start using the Redis service' blog series

  1. Redis on SAP BTP - Understanding service entitlements and metrics
  2. Redis on SAP BTP - Create a service instance in CF via BTP Cockpit (this blog post)
  3. Redis on SAP BTP - Connect to the instance from your local PC via SSH tunnel
  4. Redis on SAP BTP - Populate a dataset to Redis cache instance using redis-cli data import
  5. Redis on SAP BTP - Update instance configuration parameters via CF Command Line Interface

Please refer always to the product official documentation at SAP Help Portal.

Thanks for your reading,

SAP BTP Backing Services – Product Management

entry.title: How to extract business configuration data from SAP ByDesign?
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Has anyone done extraction of business configuration object data from SAP Business ByDesign?

There are no web services or APIs for business configuration objects...

Also we can't create OData services for business configuration objects...

So is there another way to extract the business configuration data including all settings in the fine tuning activities?

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Kostadin

entry.title: Re: New trial capability for SAP Application Interface Framework
entry.content:
Hi ZFiori,

yes, it is. 

Regards,

ChriLor

entry.title: Re: How do I configure automated financial closing in SAP...
entry.content: thank you for your assistance

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Dortmund 11.07.2024
entry.content:
***English version below***

Glück auf,

am 11.07.2024 um 18:30 findet unser nächster SAP Stammtisch / SAP Community Meetup Dortmund statt.

Eingeladen ist jeder, der Lust und Zeit hat, unabhängig vom fachlichen Hintergrund, von Entwickler, Berater, Projekt Manager, Basis Administrator bis hin zum Endanwender.

Wir freuen uns über bekannte und neue Gesichter. Melde dich idealerweise bis zum 04.07. an, damit wir passend planen können. Aber auch eine spontane Teilnahme ist gern gesehen.

Datum: 11.07.2024
Uhrzeit: 18:30
Wo: HÖVELS Hausbrauerei, Hoher Wall 5-7, Dortmund, Germany

Bis dann!

----

Glück auf,

on July 11th, 2024, at 6:30 PM, our next SAP Stammtisch / SAP Community Meetup Dortmund will take place.

Everyone is invited, regardless of their professional background, from developers, consultants, project managers, basis administrators to end users.

We look forward to seeing familiar and new faces. Ideally, please RSVP by the 4th so that we can plan accordingly. However, spontaneous participation is also welcome.

Date: July 11th, 2024
Time: 6:30 PM
Where: HÖVELS Hausbrauerei, Hoher Wall 5-7, Dortmund, Germany

See you then!

entry.title: Re: RAP : Multi Level List (3 level)
entry.content: resolved by self.

entry.title: Error because of not released Object in BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi experts!

I have the follwoing problem because of non-released objects.

I created a behavior implementation class zcl_bp_header. In this class, I'm using the method save_modified. This method has an import parameter !UPDATE type DATA.

I created a util-class zcl_util in another Software Component. The classes of this swc contain methods, which shall be used in all services/apps we're creating. A method get_component_names returns a list/table with all names of the components of a given structure. Therefore I use the method cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_data_ref( REF #( update-header-%control ) ). 

When I call this method within my zcl_bp_header class, everything works finde. When I call this method within my class zcl_util, I get a runtime error "TYPE_NOT_RELEASED". 

I released (C1) the zcl_util as well as the zcl_bp_header class.

Does anyone know, how to solve this problem?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Thank you for your response,

I don't want to use the original GL.

I want to substitute it with other GL accounts in the generated FI document.

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hello Gavin, 

How could that help me in my case?

entry.title: Error while calling SAP API Proxy connected to SAP Gateway service
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The client/consumer of our SAP API Proxy is facing the below issue while calling it.
FYI, API Proxy is connected to backend OData gateway service via API provider. While doing the $metadata call to the SAP gateway, it responded with below error to SAP API M. But after 4 hours the service was back and we see successful message.
But since this is an intermittent issue, we wanted to understand the root cause of the failure. Also where do we get the error logs in SAP gateway for GET $metadata calls that are failed.

Error:

{
  "fault": {
    "faultstring": "Unexpected EOF at target",
    "detail": {
      "errorcode": "messaging.adaptors.http.flow.UnexpectedEOFAtTarget"
    }
  }

Thanks,

Jovita

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to distribute external learning certif...
entry.content: The only option that comes to mind, as there is no item record or completion record, is to create a custom report that has external training name hard coded on the report. You can add in all the users and the certificates will be created in a PDF so that they can be distributed via email or some other manner. The LMS system though wouldn't be the one to send the certificate nor would there be a completion record on the user record for this external event.

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content: Hi User_B,

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hello Brahms,

I want to substitute the original GL with other GLs.

entry.title: Manually changed product description not getting updated to outbound delivery
entry.content:
Why manually changed product description of a product in a sales order is not being updated in the outbound delivery?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Manually changed product description not getting upda...
entry.content:
When you manually change the production description in a sales order, the same description is not updated in other documents. The system only retrieves product details from the product master data.

If you want a different product description, please change the description in the product master data and save it.

After making this change, create a new sales order and complete the document flow. The updated data will then be carried over to the outbound delivery. This is the expected behavior of the system.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to switch the display of a dimension i...
entry.content:
Hi,

I have written the script for button to show "Display ID".

Chart_1.getDataSource().setMemberDisplayMode("Dimension 1",MemberDisplayMode.DisplayId);

"Display Description"

Chart_1.getDataSource().setMemberDisplayMode("Dimension 1",MemberDisplayMode.Description);

"Display ID and Description"

Chart_1.getDataSource().setMemberDisplayMode("Dimension 1",MemberDisplayMode.DisplayIdAndDescription);

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hi User B,

I have worked on FAGLGA31 some time back, where we were able to achieve a similar requirement. I dont exactly recollect the steps right now.

But a simple solution would be to apply a substitution using GGB1, when T code - FAGLGA35 & GL A/c = ABC then substitute as PQR.


Hope this helps.

Regards,
Gavin.

entry.title: How can the Enterprise Solution Architecture (ESA) support digital business transformation 4 SAP?
entry.content:
Enterprise architecture and the frequently used methodology TOGAF (The Open Group Architecture Framework) have an image problem. Business and IT leaders are sometimes bypassing the enterprise architects because of the following reasons;

1 The enterprise architecture & TOGAF is sometimes not practical, to complete and difficult to explain

2 The EA terminology is sometimes difficult to understand and not aligned with operational departments

3 The EA governance methodology and extensive EA models are difficult to understand and to maintain

4 Too much EA focus on specific project architecture deliverables and fragmented IT solution architecture

Because of these reasons the enterprise architect and business & IT leaders are not always aligned and do not fully cooperate to resolve the EA topics at hand. Most of the design decisions are made by business & IT leaders which are not always in line with the agreed EA vision and design principles developed by the enterprise architect supported by the EA board. This has an impact on the consistency and quality of the EA architecture.

In order to improve the cooperation between business & IT, an Enterprise Solution Architecture should be implemented in a practical and structured way supported by an E2E ITSM toolchain. (e.g. Cloud ALM, Signavio) and a business process governance board / design authority.

This Enterprise Solution Architecture (ESA) could be the practical solution, not to replace TOGAF, but to have an additional practical and presentable EA framework and solution architecture to resolve and implement the EA topics quickly and to get improved commitment & alignment based on business model & operating models from the business and IT leaders.

The ESA framework should also contain integrated EA best practices, EA models, EA standards and managed by integrated ESA E2E governance processes. The following blog (based on several SAP implementations) gives an example of such an Enterprise Solution Architecture;

https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-can-enterprise-architecture-support-digital-business-frank-luyckx?trackingId=LirzeJPITAy1u1JS55VkCA%3D%3D&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Ad_flagship3_profile_view_base_recent_activity_content_view%3BWziyEHOBTSuxeYdc%2FNh35A%3D%3D

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content: Thanks Gavin for your response, How could that help me in my Case.

entry.title: Re: Sap Archieve Object Size
entry.content:
Hello @ben09 

Are you referring to ILM or NLS as stated in the Blog - SAP (Sybase) IQ – the hidden treasure …

In general, BLOBs coming from from the transactional SAP Systems are bigger chunks of date, while the historical data coming from the BW System are in records.

You can assume at least 50% compression Rate from HANA to IQ, and beside that, the existing compression rates from the main non HANA databases as follows:
Microsoft SQL Server compressed => 1:1
IDM DB/6 => 2:1
Oracle => 3:1

In any case, a Pilot Implementation of SAP IQ and some test data will give you all the wanted details.

Furthermore, PBS Software has even detailed Reports for evaluation the estimated sizes.

Best Regards @RolandKramer

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content: Hello Gavin, the problem is that substations in GGB1 doesn't substitute the GLs in the generated FI document.

entry.title: What are the benefits of using TraceShipments.com for tracking packages?
entry.content:
TraceShipments.com simplifies the process of tracking packages by bringing together information from various courier services into one easy-to-use platform. Instead of checking multiple websites, you get real-time updates on your package’s status and location all in one place. This makes it convenient and saves you a lot of time.

For businesses, TraceShipments.com offers detailed analytics and reporting tools to help improve delivery performance and manage logistics better. The user-friendly interface ensures that anyone can easily access these features. Overall, it makes tracking packages more efficient and helps businesses run more smoothly.
Now people can easily check shipment status in one place.
